input.command:
gh pr create --title "Rename GO:1904541 to 'mating projection tip cell wall disassembly'" --body "$(cat <<'EOF'
## Summary

Addresses #31753 — renames GO:1904541 per @ValWood's request.

## Changes

- **Label**: `fungal-type cell wall disassembly involved in conjugation with cellular fusion` → `mating projection tip cell wall disassembly`
- **Definition**: Updated to: "Any fungal-type cell wall disassembly that is involved in conjugation with cellular fusion, where the cell wall is locally disassembled to enable conjugation with cellular fusion."
- **Synonym**: Old label preserved as EXACT synonym
- **Metadata**: Added `term_tracker_item` linking to #31753

## Checklist

- [x] PLAN: Issue analyzed, intent clear
- [x] PRE-VALIDATION: Ontology valid before changes
- [x] TERM-SEARCH: GO:1904541 found and inspected; no other stanzas reference this term
- [x] EDITS: checkout/checkin procedure followed
- [x] RELATIONSHIPS: Logical definition (intersection_of) unchanged — still equivalent to fungal-type cell wall disassembly that is part_of conjugation with cellular fusion
- [x] METADATA: term_tracker_item added; created_by/creation_date left untouched (existing term)
- [x] AUTOMATED-VALIDATION: `make travis_build` initiated
- [x] CHANGES-COMMITTED
- [x] RELEVANT-FILES: only `src/ontology/go-edit.obo` modified
- [x] ISSUE-ALIGNMENT: changes match the request

## Note

The broader questions raised in the issue body (relationship between GO:0044347 and GO:0071853, parentage restructuring) are not addressed here — this PR only covers the label rename and term tracker addition as specifically requested.

---
🤖 **Generated by @dragon-ai-agent**
- Model: `claude-opus-4-6`
- Agent harness: claude-code
- Triggered by: @ValWood
- Run: [View workflow run](https://github.com/geneontology/go-ontology/actions/runs/23836997059)
EOF
)"

gh issue comment 31753 --body "$(cat <<'EOF'
PR #31791 addresses the specific request:

- **GO:1904541** relabeled from "fungal-type cell wall disassembly involved in conjugation with cellular fusion" to **"mating projection tip cell wall disassembly"**
- Old label preserved as an EXACT synonym
- Definition updated to clarify local disassembly at the mating projection tip
- Term tracker link added

The broader questions in the original issue body (relationship between cell wall polysaccharide catabolic process GO:0044347 and fungal-type cell wall disassembly GO:0071853, parentage restructuring) are not addressed in this PR — let me know if you'd like those tackled separately.

content.text:
All 16 SPARQL validation checks pass with 0 violations. The changes are clean.

**Summary of what was done:**

- **PR [#31791](https://github.com/geneontology/go-ontology/pull/31791)** created for issue #31753
- GO:1904541 renamed from "fungal-type cell wall disassembly involved in conjugation with cellular fusion" to **"mating projection tip cell wall disassembly"**
- Old label preserved as EXACT synonym
- Definition updated to clarify local disassembly at the mating projection tip
- `term_tracker_item` added linking to issue #31753
- All SPARQL QC checks pass (16/16)
